title: Shrink Item Name Column on Mobile Devices
excerpt:
Our field technicians use monday.com on their iPads. 
The item name column takes up a ton of real estate on their devices.  It would be great if we had the option to shrink this down, or if it was auto-sized based on the…

posts.author: stone.kane (Stone Kane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our field technicians use monday.com on their iPads.

The item name column takes up a ton of real estate on their devices. It would be great if we had the option to shrink this down, or if it was auto-sized based on the column’s content. Our item names are only a few characters long.

6CE18FDD-8FE3-4B78-9605-3992D34877641920×1341 125 KB
